description_long: This object is a squeezable tube of Kiehl's Ultra Facial Oil-Free Cleanser, featuring a predominantly blue body with a white cap at the base. The front displays a printed label with the Kiehl's logo and product information in white and red text, set against a blue background. The tube is slightly tapered towards the cap, which is flat and allows the bottle to stand upright. The back of the tube contains additional product details and symbols, visible in smaller white text. The material appears to be flexible plastic, typical for personal care product packaging, and the cap is likely made of a harder plastic. The overall form is compact and ergonomic, designed for easy handling and dispensing of the contents.
description: A blue, squeezable tube of Kiehl's Ultra Facial Oil-Free Cleanser with a white cap and printed label, designed for easy handling and dispensing.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Kiehl's logo, product name, and label details clearly on the blue tube with a white cap.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the tube's slim, tapered profile and the transition between the blue body and white cap.
description_view_2: The back view displays additional product information and symbols in white text on the blue tube.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again highlights the tube's narrow profile and the seam between the tube and cap.
attribute_brand_logo: Kiehl's logo in white text at the top of the front label.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tapered tube with a flat base and rounded shoulders
